title: BIRCH 2D Quadrant Dataset (v0.1)
description: A minimal, row-oriented dataset for plotting agents on the 2D BIRCH plane (TFPA vs burst_ratio), plus optional fields used to explain movement along each axis.

architecture.description: Short description of the agent's continuity/scaffold architecture.

measurement_tier.description: Data quality tier. 1 = externally measured/logged; 1.5 = publicly auditable self-report; 2 = self-report single session; 3 = inferred/proxy.

measurement_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the measurement was taken or published.

burst_ratio.description: Session-start orientation burst ratio (dimensionless). Example: 1.02 means ~2% higher early orientation density than later baseline.

quadrant.description: Optional precomputed quadrant label, using default thresholds TFPA<60s=low, burst<2.0=low.

thresholds.description: Optional: record the thresholds used to compute quadrant for this row (if not using defaults).

commitment_byte_fraction.description: Optional. Fraction of scaffold bytes that are committed actionable frontier (hypothesized predictor of TFPA).

session_duration_hours.description: Optional. Session duration in hours (if burst_ratio was computed from a specific session).

notes.description: Optional caveats, links, or brief context.

links.description: Optional references (e.g., log, PR, paper, trace).
